text: I will tell you in this video what are the ideas and classes? The concept of the idea and classes is very confusing. One is that when I was learning HTML, I was very confused in my early days in the idea and classes. The idea is unique identifier. If you give an idea to an element, then you will not give the other element that the idea is ideal.
